zh.lifeSummary: 當John Shelley於1506年10月6日出生在英國素可可拉法姆時，他的父親Sir William Shelley26歲，母親Alice Belknap26歲。他於1525年與Lady Mary FitzWilliam在英國結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和11個女兒的父母。他去世於1550年12月15日在英國素可米爾格洛福享年44歲，埋葬在英國素可可拉法姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Shelley于1506年10月6日出生在英国素可可拉法姆时，他的父亲Sir William Shelley26岁，母亲Alice Belknap26岁。他于1525年与Lady Mary FitzWilliam在英国结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和11个女儿的父母。他去世于1550年12月15日在英国素可米爾格洛福享年44岁，埋葬在英国素可可拉法姆。

nameMeanings.name: Shelley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the three places called Shelley (Essex, Suffolk, Yorkshire) or from Shelley Plain in Crawley (Sussex). The placenames all derive from Old English scelf ‘rock, ledge, shelf’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.
Irish (Laois): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Sealbhaigh ‘descendant of Sealbhach’, a byname from the adjective sealbhach ‘having possessions, wealthy’.

variants.name: Shallow
meanings: Irish (Kilkenny and Wexford): variant of   Shelley  .
English: nickname from Middle English shalou(e) ‘shallow’, conjectured also to mean ‘thin’; perhaps also the same word in the topographic sense of ‘shallow place in a stretch of water’.

variants.name: Shelly
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Shelley  .

variants.name: Sheley
meanings: Irish and English: variant of   Shelley  .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When John Shelley was born on 6 October 1506, in Clapham, Sussex, England, his father, Sir William Shelley, was 26 and his mother, Alice Belknap, was 26. He married Lady Mary FitzWilliam in 1525, in England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 11 daughters. He died on 15 December 1550, in Michelgrove, Sussex, England, at the age of 44, and was buried in Clapham, Sussex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Shelley est né le 6 octobre 1506, à Clapham, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Shelley, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Alice Belknap, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Lady Mary FitzWilliam en 1525, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 11 filles. Il est décédé le 15 décembre 1550, à Michelgrove, Sussex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 44 ans, et a été enterré à Clapham, Sussex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Shelley am 6. Oktober 1506 in Clapham, Sussex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William Shelley 26 und seine Mutter Alice Belknap 26. Er hat 1525 in England Lady Mary FitzWilliam geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 11 Töchter. Er starb am 15. Dezember 1550 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Michelgrove, Sussex, England und wurde in Clapham, Sussex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Shelley è nato il il 6 ottobre 1506 nel Clapham, Sussex, England, il suo padre, Sir William Shelley, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Alice Belknap, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Lady Mary FitzWilliam nel 1525, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 11 figlie. Morì il 15 dicembre 1550, nel Michelgrove, Sussex, England, all'età di 44 anni, e fu sepolto a Clapham, Sussex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: John Shelleyが1506年10月6日にイギリススセックスクラファムで生まれた時，父Sir William Shelleyは26歳，母Alice Belknapは26歳であった。1525年にイギリスでLady Mary FitzWilliamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と11人の娘の親であった。彼は1550年12月15日にイギリススセックスミチェルグローブで44歳で死去し，イギリススセックスクラファムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Shelley(이)가 1506년 10월 6일 영국 수세스 클라프아에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Shelley(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Belknap(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1525년 영국에서 Lady Mary FitzWilliam(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 열 명 이상의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1550년 12월 15일 영국 수세스 믹헬그로브에서 44세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수세스 클라프아에 묻혔다.

pt.6 October 1506–15 December 1550: 6 de outubro de 1506–15 de dezembro de 1550
pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Shelley nasceu em 6 de outubro de 1506, em Clapham, Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William Shelley, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Alice Belknap, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Mary FitzWilliam em 1525, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 11 filhas. Ele faleceu em 15 de dezembro de 1550, em Michelgrove, Sussex, Inglaterra, com 44 anos, e foi sepultado em Clapham, Sussex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Shelley родился 6 октября 1506 г. в местности клафам, суссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir William Shelley было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Belknap, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Mary FitzWilliam в 1525 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 11 дочерей. Он умер 15 декабря 1550 г. в местности мишелгров, суссекс, Англия в возрасте 44 лет и был похоронен в местности клафам, суссекс, Англия.

es.6 October 1506–15 December 1550: 6 de octubre de 1506–15 de diciembre de 1550
es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Shelley nació el 6 de octubre de 1506, en Clapham, Sussex, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir William Shelley, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Alice Belknap, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Lady Mary FitzWilliam en 1525, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 11 hijas. Murió el 15 de diciembre de 1550, en Michelgrove, Sussex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 44 años, y fue sepultado en Clapham, Sussex, Inglaterra.
